default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review Augment Code Sprint progress and align on content strategy adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/pLEy8NSEr-smN-yLvJqv5syCzjug5jiT?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways
